## Quotation candidates (auto excerpt)

**gt-07 (excerpt):** - Reviews British game foundations and explains how the U.S. scales them by solving ethnicity, currency, and scale constraints. - Frames the U.S. constitutional system as a game architecture optimized for open participation, rule clarity, and merit signaling. - Traces Bretton Woods, dollar centrality, and postwar institutions as mechanisms for globalizing one economic-political game. ---
